New: One connection URL for adding Quark to Claude and ChatGPT
WordPress approval screen for AI assistant connections
Connection management for reviewing and disconnecting AI assistants
Admin settings app with About, Connect, Connections, Actions, and Changelog tabs
Configurable actions that can be enabled or disabled after a site is connected
Improved: Settings UI now focuses on the simple user setup flow instead of protocol details
Copy controls make the connection URL and Claude command easier to use
Connection setup avoids duplicate URL sections and keeps provider instructions focused
About tab now explains Quark features without showing setup fields
About tab copy now uses the full available section width
Advanced tab removed from the Quark settings app
Quark settings now preserve WordPress admin notices instead of removing unrelated notices
Action names are compatible with Claude while older internal aliases remain callable
Added actions for comments, media upload, site information, plugin inventory, and theme inventory
Added bridge actions for supported actions registered by WordPress and other plugins
Dev: Added prerelease GitHub Action to build Composer and npm artifacts on release
Added AGENTS.md standards for planning-first workflow and release discipline
Added PHPUnit unit test setup for fast connector regression coverage
Documented tool-name compatibility rules and the test suite layout
Added WordPress.org readme.txt with external service disclosures
Added Plugin Check gating before release artifacts are generated
